# Skill: Application Deployment and Release

Purpose
Deploy the application to a publicly accessible environment.

Deployment Strategy

Frontend deployment platforms
Vercel
Netlify

Backend deployment platforms
Render
Railway
Fly.io

Database hosting
MongoDB Atlas or managed cloud databases.

Deployment Process

1. Configure environment variables.

2. Deploy backend API service.

3. Verify backend endpoints are publicly accessible.

4. Deploy frontend application.

5. Configure frontend API base URL.

6. Perform production validation tests.

Deliverables

• Live application URL  
• Verified production deployment
